  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "PEX tubing is routed directly through a concrete slab without a protective sleeve or wrapping."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install a continuous protective sleeve or wrapping around the PEX tubing where it penetrates the concrete slab to allow for expansion, contraction, and protection from chemical/abrasive damage."
  ],
  "rationale": "Both the International Plumbing Code (IPC) and PEX manufacturer specifications require PEX tubing penetrating concrete slabs to be sleeved or wrapped to protect the pipe from abrasion, chemical reaction with the concrete, and to allow for thermal expansion and contraction.",
  "references": [
    "IPC Section 305.3 (Pipes through foundation walls)",
    "IPC Section 305.2 (Protection against physical damage)",
    "PEX Manufacturer Installation Guidelines"
  ]
}
